supply_chain.dependencies: Single-source suppliers for some components and materials used in manufacturing processes; dependence on third-party contract manufacturing organizations (CMOs) for fill-finish and production; reliance on third-party service providers for raw materials, components, parts, and consumables
supply_chain.risks: Disruptions from single-source suppliers; supply chain interruptions due to raw material shortages; delays from third-party manufacturers; geopolitical tensions affecting supply chain; concentration risk in certain suppliers; potential for counterfeiting and theft of inventory; reliance on third parties for quality testing and shipping

regulatory_risks: FDA regulatory approval delays or denials for product candidates
Changes in regulatory requirements or interpretations by FDA, EMA, and other global regulators
Post-approval regulatory scrutiny and potential product recalls
Risk of clinical holds or termination of clinical trials by regulators
Classification of mRNA therapies as gene therapies leading to increased regulatory burdens
Potential for new legislation or regulations restricting mRNA medicines
Compliance with GDPR and data privacy regulations in EU and UK
Export control regulations and trade restrictions (e.g., Export Administration Regulations)
Compliance with anti-bribery laws (FCPA, UK Bribery Act)
Healthcare fraud and abuse laws (Anti-Kickback Statute, False Claims Act, HIPAA)
Pricing and reimbursement regulations (Medicare, Medicaid, Inflation Reduction Act)
Potential government march-in rights on patents developed under government funding
Regulatory changes from Loper Bright decision affecting agency deference
Compulsory licensing laws in foreign countries
Vaccine mandate policies and public health authority recommendations
Regulatory requirements for pediatric studies and data
Risk Evaluation and Mitigation Strategies (REMS) requirements

sanction_risks: Potential sanctions affecting export of mRNA technology to certain markets
Trade restrictions and tariffs impacting supply chain and costs
Geopolitical tensions (US-China, Middle East conflicts) affecting market access and operations
